metadata.description: PPT Master skill — AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document

plugins.name: ppt-master
plugins.description: Generate natively editable PPTX from PDF / DOCX / URL / Markdown — real DrawingML shapes, text boxes, charts, and animations. Note: this plugin ships only the skill files; you must also `pip install -r requirements.txt` from the project root for the Python post-processing scripts to run.
